race.comment: ISLA DELILAH (10) brings three placed runs to peaks and there was little in it over 1800m at the Sunshine Coast the latest. Races forward and is ready for the middle distance. Well placed to break through. PROMISES MADE (11) improved sharply beaten 2.8L at Doomben over a mile. Pulled up with an issue well supported at the Sunshine Coast her latest and forgive. Is back after 3-weeks and draws well. Angela Jones' engagement suggests she's pleasing. WANNA KISS (9) has been racing well without winning. Found one much too good over 1800m at Eagle Farm last time but covered the others. She can make the finish again. MONTEVECCHIO (2) didn't manage the wide gate here last time in a 58 but went close at the track over this distance prior. Draws awkwardly again but should enjoy better luck.
